mapper.select:
SELECT ID, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ID, DEPT_NAME, DEPT_ID, WORK_PROCESS_ID, WORK_PROCESS_NAME,SALARY_TYPE_CODE,SALARY_TYPE_NAME, WORK_PROCESS_CHILD_ID, WORK_PROCESS_CHILD_NAME, PRICE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_PIECE_PRICE
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_PIECE_PRICE( ID, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ID, DEPT_NAME, DEPT_ID, SALARY_TYPE_CODE, SALARY_TYPE_NAME, WORK_PROCESS_ID, WORK_PROCESS_NAME, WORK_PROCESS_CHILD_ID, WORK_PROCESS_CHILD_NAME, PRICE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{salaryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salaryTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workProcessId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workProcessName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workProcessChildId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workProcessChildName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_PIECE_PRICE SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, WORK_PROCESS_ID = #{workProcessId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_PROCESS_NAME = #{workProcessName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_PROCESS_CHILD_ID = #{workProcessChildId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_PROCESS_CHILD_NAME = #{workProcessChildName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALARY_TYPE_CODE = #{salaryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALARY_TYPE_NAME = #{salaryTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRICE = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
